periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 73. South wind around 6 mph.

periods.name: Sunday
periods.short_forecast: Partly Sunny then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely after 3pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 94. Heat index values as high as 100. South wind 6 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Sunday Night
periods.short_forecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 11pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11pm and 2am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 72. Southwest wind 10 to 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

periods.name: Monday
periods.detailed_forecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 83. North wind 6 to 14 mph.
